title: thelypteris subdimorpha
intro: Thelypteris subdimorpha, also known as the Dimorphic Lady Fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the fern family (Thelypteridaceae) and is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Thelypteris subdimorpha include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can be used externally as a poultice or compress for wound healing and skin issues.
